## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

* [ ] Bug fix
* [ ] New feature
* [ ] Refactoring
* [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

* [ ] I ran `./gradlew spotlessCheck clean build`
* [ ] I added or updated tests where needed
* [ ] I updated documentation where needed
* [ ] I kept Spring-specific types out of `reactive-transaction-api`
* [ ] I avoided unrelated changes
